title: digitaria cognata var. arenicola
intro: Digitaria cognata var. arenicola, commonly known as 'Beach Finger Grass', is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Digitaria cognata var. arenicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, and its leaves and stems can be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
